content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Killer
description: Legendary Killer is a Legendary class mod for Zer0 in Borderlands 2.
notes:
Added with Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge. It cannot be obtained without this DLC.

Its red text is a shortened, commonly memed version of a line from Anchorman.

special.description: At max level: Team critical hit damage +62%.
special.title: "Well, that escalated quickly."
